text.title: Agentic FinOps Workflow with AI Agents Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Run decision tree; verify INFORM-phase artefacts and approver registry exist.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: design-agent-roster
step.action: Define each agent (role, schedule, IAM scope, action list); attach approval policy per action.

step.name: wire-approval-channel
step.action: Configure Slack/Jira approval flow with structured payload schema; test with a no-op action.

step.name: set-budgets-and-evidence
step.action: Define per-hour/per-day action budgets; provision evidence store (S3+Object Lock).

step.name: validate-and-pilot
step.action: Run validator; pilot with read-only agents first; then enable optimizer with low budget; expand.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
